title: ayenia heterophylla
intro: Ayenia heterophylla, also known as 'Mexican stonecrop,' is a type of succulent plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Ayenia heterophylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat skin irritations and promote tissue repair.
